# HR Stack Solutions - LLMs.txt
# AI crawler accessibility map for hrstacksolutions.com

## Site Info
Name: HR Stack Solutions
URL: https://hrstacksolutions.com
Description: Independent reviews and comparisons of HR software for small businesses under 100 employees
Founder: Malik
Founded: 2026

## Content Sections

### Pillar Pages
- /pillars/payroll-software - Payroll software reviews and comparisons
- /pillars/hris-systems - HRIS systems for small business
- /pillars/benefits-admin - Benefits administration platforms
- /pillars/peo-eor - PEO and Employer of Record services
- /pillars/time-tracking - Employee time tracking solutions
- /pillars/employee-wellness - Employee wellness platforms

### Blog Articles
- /blog/best-payroll-under-50-employees - Best payroll software for small teams
- /blog/best-hris-under-100-employees - Top HRIS for growing companies
- /blog/cheapest-payroll-2026 - Affordable payroll options 2026
- /blog/gusto-vs-onpay - Gusto vs OnPay comparison
- /blog/bamboohr-vs-gusto - BambooHR vs Gusto head-to-head
- /blog/justworks-vs-trinet - Justworks vs TriNet PEO comparison
- /blog/affordable-hr-startups - HR software for startups on a budget
- /blog/employee-onboarding-software - Best onboarding platforms
- /blog/best-benefits-admin - Benefits administration software
- /blog/best-peo-under-50-employees - PEO for small business

### Legal Pages
- /privacy - Privacy Policy
- /terms - Terms of Service
- /affiliate-disclosure - Affiliate Disclosure
- /about - About Us

## Affiliate Programs
We review and link to: Gusto, BambooHR, Justworks, OnPay, TriNet, ADP, Rippling, Deel, Zenefits, 15Five

## Structured Data
This site implements JSON-LD schema:
- WebSite
- Organization
- Article
- Product (review)
- FAQPage
- BreadcrumbList
